creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
Evidently so: 

root@mowa219-gjp4-zbook-freebsd:~ # service webcamd stop
Stopping webcamd.
Waiting for PIDs: 1328 1123
root@mowa219-gjp4-zbook-freebsd:~ # service webcamd start
Starting webcamd.
root@mowa219-gjp4-zbook-freebsd:~ # service webcamd status
webcamd is not running.
root@mowa219-gjp4-zbook-freebsd:~ # uname -mvKU
FreeBSD 15.0-CURRENT main-n276254-22fe926a62b7 GENERIC-NODEBUG amd64 1500035 1500035
root@mowa219-gjp4-zbook-freebsd:~ #
